name: Jake Morrison
title: Frequent Business Traveler & Productivity Coach
bio: As a management consultant, Jake spends over 200 days a year on the road, flying between client meetings across North America and Europe. He's become an expert at maximizing productivity while traveling, managing jet lag, and maintaining his health despite a packed schedule. Jake shares practical, no-nonsense advice for business travelers who want to perform at their best, no matter where they land.
